title: Batch 3 & 4: Grouped display layout with expandable rows, ageing badges, image modal, and filters/search across tabs

requirements.text: In the Total Orders tab (TotalOrdersTab.tsx), group pending orders by design code. Each design code group displays a single header row showing: design code (clickable), order type badge (RB/CO/SO), karigar name, total sub-order count, total qty, and total weight. The group row has a chevron toggle to expand/collapse its sub-orders. Sub-order rows show: order number, qty, weight, generic name, order date, and an ageing badge (days since order date, colour-coded: green ≤14d, amber 15–29d, red ≥30d). A checkbox on the group row selects all its sub-orders; individual sub-order checkboxes also work. The Mark as Ready action continues to work on selected sub-orders.

quotes: Grouped design code rows with expandable suborders
Ageing badges, karigar name, order type badge

acceptanceCriteria: Orders are visually grouped by design code with a collapsible group header row
Group header shows design code, order type badge (RB/CO/SO), karigar name, sub-order count, qty, and weight
Chevron icon toggles expand/collapse of sub-orders for that group
Sub-order rows show order number, qty, weight, generic name, order date, and ageing badge
Ageing badge is green for ≤14 days, amber for 15–29 days, red for ≥30 days
Group checkbox selects/deselects all sub-orders in the group
Individual sub-order checkboxes work independently
Mark as Ready action works correctly on selected sub-orders

requirements.text: Apply the same grouped design code layout (expandable sub-orders, ageing badges, karigar name, order type badge) to the Ready tab (ReadyTab.tsx) and the Hallmark tab (HallmarkTab.tsx), preserving their existing actions (return to pending for Ready; mark as returned for Hallmark).

quotes: Grouped design code rows with expandable suborders
Ageing badges, karigar name, order type badge

acceptanceCriteria: Ready tab groups orders by design code with expandable sub-orders, ageing badges, karigar name, and order type badge
Hallmark tab groups orders by design code with expandable sub-orders, ageing badges, karigar name, and order type badge
Existing action buttons (return to pending, mark as returned) remain functional on sub-order rows or group rows as appropriate

requirements.text: When the user clicks a design code in any group header row (Total Orders, Ready, Hallmark tabs), open the existing DesignImageModal for that design code, showing the associated design image with zoom/pan support.

quotes: Image modal on design code click

acceptanceCriteria: Clicking a design code text in the group header opens DesignImageModal for that design code
Modal shows the design image with zoom and pan (existing DesignImageModal behaviour)
Modal can be closed and the table remains in its current expand/collapse state
Works across Total Orders, Ready, and Hallmark tabs

requirements.text: Add a search bar and two filter dropdowns (order type: All Types / RB / CO / SO; karigar: All Karigars / <list of karigars>) above the orders table in the Total Orders, Ready, and Hallmark tabs. The search input filters rows by design code, order number, or generic name (case-insensitive, partial match). The order type dropdown filters to show only groups matching the selected type. The karigar dropdown filters to show only groups assigned to the selected karigar. All three controls work together (AND logic). Match the UI shown in the uploaded screenshot: search bar on the left, two pill/capsule dropdowns on the right.

quotes: Search by design code, order number, generic name
RB/CO/SO filter + karigar filter across Total Orders, Ready, Hallmark tabs

acceptanceCriteria: Search bar is present above the orders table in Total Orders, Ready, and Hallmark tabs
Typing in the search bar filters groups/sub-orders by design code, order number, or generic name (partial, case-insensitive)
Order type dropdown offers options: All Types, RB, CO, SO
Karigar dropdown is populated with unique karigar names from current orders, plus an 'All Karigars' default
Selecting an order type hides groups that do not match
Selecting a karigar hides groups not assigned to that karigar
All three controls combine with AND logic
Filters reset when switching tabs
Layout matches the screenshot: search left, two dropdowns right

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
Preserve all existing actions: Mark as Ready, Return to Pending, Mark as Returned, bulk selection, export
Do not change backend data models or queries — all grouping and filtering must be done on the frontend
nonGoals: Fixing the dashboard loading issue from v155/v156 (separate known issue)
Changing the Karigars tab or Customer Orders tab layout
Adding new backend endpoints or modifying existing Motoko data structures
Modifying the AgeingStock page (separate page, not dashboard tabs)
